title: Scalar Products from a Figure
body: Vectors are given by their magnitudes and directions from the $$+x$$ axis (horizontal right): $$A=10.0$$ at 150°, $$B=5.0$$ at 127°, $$C=12.0$$ at 300°, $$D=20.0$$ at 217°, $$F=20.0$$ at 240°. Find the following scalar products: (a) $$A C$$, (b) $$A F$$, (c) $$D C$$, (d) $$A \left(F+2C\right)$$, (e) $$i B$$, (f) $$j B$$, (g) $$\left(3i-j\right) B$$, (h) $$B B$$.
